science.title: Treating tumors independently of oxygen: Photodynamic therapy uses hydrogen peroxide instead
science.description: Photodynamic treatment of cancer is based on administering an initially inactive substance that is only activated in the tumor via targeted light irradiation. It then generates reactive oxygen species that kill the cancer cells. However, this method reaches its limits when no oxygen is present, as is the case with many fast-growing tumors.

science.title: How stem cell descendants preserve flexibility while maintaining distinct identities
science.description: Stem cells are the body's ultimate shape-shifters, sustaining tissues by balancing two competing demands: maintaining their own population and generating specialized descendants. In many tissues, some early descendants can revert to a stem cell state through a process known as dedifferentiation. This ability can help replenish the stem cell pool when stem cells are lost.

ai.title: Mumbai Cyber Cell Arrests Jalna Youth For AI-Generated Defamatory Video Targeting CM Devendra Fadnavis & Ajit Pawar Plane Crash
ai.description: Police arrested Jalna resident Uddhav Bhagwan Kapse for allegedly creating an AI-generated video defaming CM Devendra Fadnavis and misrepresenting a plane crash involving Ajit Pawar. The video, which gained 1.5 lakh views, was later deleted. Kapse was remanded to custody till April 10 as police probe possible links and support behind the content.
